title: jasione montana subsp. cornuta
intro: Jasione montana subsp. cornuta, also known as Cornflower, is a flowering plant species in the family Campanulaceae. It is a perennial plant native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia, and has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Cornflower include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, while also providing relief from menstrual cramps and other gynecological issues. Cornflower can be used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
